retryReason: Fixed bugs from evaluation-01.json: copied GOV.UK Frontend font/image assets to frontend/public/assets/ so Vite can resolve them at /assets/fonts/* and /assets/images/*. Frontend build now completes with zero warnings.

buildResults.frontend: SUCCESS - TypeScript compiles clean, Vite build complete with ZERO warnings (fonts and images now at public/assets/)

accessibilityChecks.publishButton: govuk-button govuk-button--secondary with id='publish-button' and aria-disabled
accessibilityChecks.publishBanner: govuk-notification-banner govuk-notification-banner--success with role='alert' and aria-labelledby
accessibilityChecks.errorSummary: Extended to include publishError with href='#publish-button'
accessibilityChecks.statusTag: govuk-tag--blue for Published status, high contrast
accessibilityChecks.keyboardNav: All buttons reachable by keyboard, no tab traps added

govUkCompliance.successBanner: Uses govuk-notification-banner--success pattern from GOV.UK Design System
govUkCompliance.publishedTag: Uses govuk-tag--blue (GOV.UK tag modifier for published/live state)
govUkCompliance.errorPattern: Error summary follows GOV.UK error-summary pattern with links to erroneous controls

knownIssues: The GET /api/forms/:formId/schema endpoint behavior changed from Sprint 01 (draft → published-only). The api.test.ts tests have been updated to reflect the new behavior - upload+publish then check schema.

Lines 195-196, 224-225, 230-231, 284-285, 290-291 in forms.ts represent defensive null-check branches that are not reachable in normal test flow (store inconsistency scenarios). These do not affect the 80% threshold.
The stores.ts line 39 (findLatestByFormId returns filtered array[0]) is covered by publish.test.ts tests.

[FIXED] GOV.UK Frontend fonts/images now copied to frontend/public/assets/ so they are served at the expected absolute paths /assets/fonts/* and /assets/images/* — resolves build warnings and runtime font decode errors.
